So what happens is you'll have projects that you'll be on where you know how to do the job, but you really don't understand. Everything there is to know about that job.
So what will happen is the service manager will rover around and deal with case-by-case scenarios and help people understand. and help the employees understand, you know, here's what you did, here's my thought process on it, and here's a way to improve, you know, here's something else to consider.
